comments.text: Using ChatGPT Deep Research, I came across a paper which proves the statement for k≥33: https://ora.ox.ac.uk/objects/uuid:1fd05b3e-cd34-4b65-a95e-590af2e523dc/files/m4c717ccd310e4b8622a4423c5dcf3075 From the corollary: "For d ≥ 33 there are asymptotically $\frac{1}{6} c x^{3/d}$ integers n ≤ x which are sums of three d-th powers". Full deep research results: https://chatgpt.com/share/69ae2aa8-1eac-8003-b208-71fb3127bd7e
The published reference for the above is Browning, T. D.; Heath-Brown, D. R. Equal sums of three powers. Invent. Math. 157, No. 3, 553-573 (2004).
